Lora Selector: Selects a local LoRA entry, resolves it against the current model list, and appends it to a lora_stack.
PixAI Tagger: Runs the local PixAI Tagger v0.9 bundle and returns prompt-ready general, character, and IP tags.
Prompt Template: Renders prompt templates with wildcard expansion, Dynamic Prompts syntax, comment removal, extras-based $key replacement, and optional deterministic seeds.
Set String Extra: Adds or overwrites a single key/value entry in image_info extras.
Aspect Ratio to Size: Resolves aligned width and height values from aspect-ratio inputs and returns width x height alongside separate outputs.
Mask Overlay Comparer: Shows a slider preview that compares the input image with a blue-tinted soft-mask overlay.
Grow Mask: Expands a soft or binary mask with area-aware grow and blur behavior while preserving a solid core.
Remove Small Soft Mask Regions: Removes small connected foreground regions from a soft mask while preserving the remaining soft values.
SAM3 Prompt To Mask: Generates a soft mask from text prompts using a local SAM3 checkpoint, with comma-separated prompts treated as OR conditions.
